parameters.name: messages
parameters.value:
[{"role":"user","content":"You must return ONLY valid, parseable JSON. Do not include markdown formatting (no ```json wrappers), no preamble, and no explanations.

Analyze this business data and calculate baseline automation metrics.
Business Data: {{ $json.businessName }}, Industry: {{ $json.industry }}, Team: {{ $json.teamSize }}, Tools: {{ JSON.stringify($json.currentTools) }}, Tasks: {{ $json.mainTasks }}, Hours/Week: {{ $json.hoursPerWeek }}, Pain Point: {{ $json.painPoint }}.

Rules:
1. Assume a conservative labor cost of $25/hour for all calculations.
2. Estimated Annual Labor Cost = (Hours/Week * 52) * 25.
3. Automation Readiness Score (1-10): Base it on team size, tool modernity, and task repetitiveness.
4. Return ONLY this JSON structure:
{
  "total_manual_hours_weekly": number,
  "estimated_annual_labor_cost": number,
  "automation_readiness_score": number,
  "readiness_description": "One sentence explaining the score based on their specific tools and tasks."
}"}]

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value:
[{"role":"user","content":"You must return ONLY valid, parseable JSON. Do not include markdown formatting (no ```json wrappers), no preamble, and no explanations.

Act as an elite AI Automation Architect. Based on the business data and analyst metrics, identify the top 3 automation opportunities.
Business Data: {{ $node['Sanitizer'].json.businessName }}, Industry: {{ $node['Sanitizer'].json.industry }}, Tools: {{ JSON.stringify($node['Sanitizer'].json.currentTools) }}, Tasks: {{ $node['Sanitizer'].json.mainTasks }}, Pain Point: {{ $node['Sanitizer'].json.painPoint }}.
Analyst Metrics: {{ JSON.stringify($json) }}

Rules:
1. Opportunities MUST be specific to their stated industry, tools, and tasks. No generic advice.
2. Recommend tools primarily from this stack: n8n, Claude/OpenAI API, Google Sheets, Gmail, Slack.
3. Opportunity 1 MUST be the highest-impact, fastest-to-implement "quick win" (under 7 days).
4. Calculate hours_saved_weekly realistically (do not promise 100% elimination of complex tasks).
5. monthly_roi_estimate = (hours_saved_weekly * 4) * 25.
6. Return ONLY this JSON structure:
{
  "opportunities": [
    {
      "rank": 1,
      "title": "Short, specific title (e.g., AI Lead Scoring Agent)",
      "priority": "IMMEDIATE",
      "current_process": "2-3 sentences describing their current manual pain based on their input",
      "automated_solution": "3-4 sentences detailing the step-by-step n8n/AI workflow",
      "tools_recommended": ["n8n", "Claude API", "Gmail"],
      "hours_saved_weekly": number,
      "monthly_roi_estimate": number,
      "implementation_days": number,
      "confidence": "HIGH"
    }
  ]
}"}]

parameters.name: messages

parameters.jsCode:
const data = { form: $node['Sanitizer'].json, analyst: $node['Parse Agent 1'].json, strategist: $node['Parse Agent 2'].json, copywriter: $node['Parse Agent 3'].json }; const html = `

AI AUTOMATION AUDIT REPORT

Prepared for: ${data.form.businessName}

Industry: ${data.form.industry} | Team Size: ${data.form.teamSize}

Prepared by: [Your Name] · AI Automation Specialist

${new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' })}

01. Executive Summary

${data.copywriter.executive_summary}

02. Current State Analysis
AUTOMATION READINESS: ${data.analyst.automation_readiness_score} / 10

${data.analyst.readiness_description}

${data.analyst.total_manual_hours_weekly} hrsWeekly Manual Work
$${data.analyst.estimated_annual_labor_cost.toLocaleString()}Est. Annual Labor Cost
03. Top Automation Opportunities
${data.strategist.opportunities.map(opp => `
OPPORTUNITY #${opp.rank} · ${opp.priority}

${opp.title}

Current Process

${opp.current_process}

Automated Solution

${opp.automated_solution}

${opp.hours_saved_weekly} hrsSaved Weekly
$${opp.monthly_roi_estimate.toLocaleString()}Monthly ROI
${opp.implementation_days} DaysImplementation
${opp.confidence}Confidence
`).join('')}
04. Projected ROI Summary
Total Hours Saved Weekly${data.strategist.opportunities.reduce((acc, curr) => acc + curr.hours_saved_weekly, 0)} hours
Total Monthly Savings$${data.strategist.opportunities.reduce((acc, curr) => acc + curr.monthly_roi_estimate, 0).toLocaleString()}
Estimated Implementation Cost$800 – $1,500 (est.)
Payback PeriodWithin 2 weeks of launch
05. Next Steps

${data.copywriter.next_steps}

`; return { json: { htmlContent: html } };

parameters.subject: Your AI Automation Audit is ready — {{ $node['Sanitizer'].json.businessName }}
parameters.message:
Hi {{ $node['Sanitizer'].json.businessName.split(' ')[0] }},

As promised, your custom AI Automation Audit is attached. It includes a breakdown of your top 3 automation opportunities, ROI estimates, and a step-by-step implementation roadmap.

Review the "Next Steps" section on the final page when you're ready to move forward.

Best,
[Your Name]
